text:
Alright, story time.

The 3 songs "My Own Worst Enemy" "Buddy Holly" and "In The Meantime" have really good quality stems from the good folks over at Harmonix! (The developers that made Rock Band (formerly Guitar Hero))

But "Longview" doesn't, because when they were making Green Day Rock Band, they were trying to get all stems from 3(?) of Green Day's full albums ("Chump" was another one that they couldn't get stems for). So they decided to make their own stems, which was… (kind of awful).

So using AI for "Longview" was probably a good idea.

text:
I love how many uncomfortably-true the platform criticisms were in the Green Day one

-YouTube is way too over-monetized, and adblockers are getting cracked down on
-TikTok is entrancing, where you end up spending hours just watching it and nothing else
-Twitter is toxic and stupid, basically only useful for browsing art and/or poгn
-OnlyFans accounts are promoted intrusively
-Twitch encourages you to do otherwise-unproductive things for way too long just to get donations
-Tinder just leaves you feeling more desperate and empty than before
-Everyone forgets about DeviantArt, including the video itself
